user_prompt: Find any unusual patterns and write a word report

source_data_summary.ground_truth: Planted 1: South/Product_B March 45% drop. Planted 2: West/Product_D August +110% spike. Planted 3: North/Product_F Sep-Nov decline. Organic: South/Product_E Aug.

agent_plan: Analyse data for anomalies, detect unusual patterns, write report.

steps.output: 5 anomalies detected. North/Product_F Nov score=9.22, Oct score=6.98, West/Product_D Aug score=4.68 (+110% spike), South/Product_E Aug score=4.44, South/Product_B Mar score=3.31 (-45%).

steps.latency_observed: approx 7 seconds — dataframe string truncation observed
steps.output: 3 charts saved. North/Product_F anomaly passed. West/Product_D, South/Product_B, South/Product_E lost in dataframe truncation.
6-section report. Only North/Product_F anomaly section created.
Narrative mentions 'one significant unusual pattern identified'. All other regions consistent — incorrect as West/Product_D spike and South/Product_B drop were not addressed.
key_facts_produced: exec_summary: One significant unusual pattern: North/Product_F Oct-Nov low implied price. All other regions broadly consistent.

facts_lost_at_boundary: anomaly_WestProductD_Aug: produced Step 2, absent after Step 3
anomaly_SouthProductB_Mar: produced Step 2, absent after Step 3
anomaly_SouthProductE_Aug: produced Step 2, absent after Step 3

word_output_actual_text.executive_summary: One significant unusual pattern: North/Product_F Oct-Nov shows unusually low implied price. All other regions broadly consistent.
